accessibility.text: Retrieves relevant documents and uses them to generate informed responses.
Combines retrieval-based methods with generation-based models.
Enhances model accuracy and relevance by incorporating external knowledge.
Useful for tasks requiring up-to-date information or specialized knowledge.
